name: feature-loader-quality-profile
description: Phase 0 feature loader (ADR 0014) — load 'quality' profile, verify the expected toggles are on, screenshot. Quality profile sets progressiveBrickBaking + meshDrivenClassification + meshBootstrapRaymarch + render.tricubicEnabled + render.subBrickRefinement. Phase 0 stubs no-op; visual output should match all-off baseline modulo tricubicEnabled which is a real toggle that affects rendering.

commands: (() => { const all = window.__canaryGetAllFeatureStatus(); const expectedOn = ['progressiveBrickBaking','meshDrivenClassification','meshBootstrapRaymarch']; for (const k of expectedOn) { if (all[k]?.mode !== 'on') throw new Error('expected ' + k + ' on after quality profile, got ' + JSON.stringify(all[k])); } return 'quality profile applied'; })()
